title: Paper Accepted to Computers & Industrial Engineering 2025 🎉
detail: Yong Kyung Oh, Giheon Koh, Jiin Kwak, Kyubo Shin, Gi Soo Kim, Min Joung Lee, Hokyung Choung, Namju Kim, Jae Hoon Moon, and Sungil Kim, TAOD-Net: Automated Detection and Analysis of Thyroid-Associated Orbitopathy in Facial Imagery, accepted to Computers & Industrial Engineering (2025).
